calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-17-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearance on Wednesday, February 17, 2016, in Department 525:
FINE LINE SAWING & DRILLING, INC., Respondent/Plaintiff appears Dennis Corcoran/president and Mary Kristine T. Ibay/manager
ANDREW M. JORDAN INC dba A& B CONSTRUCTION, Appellant/Defendant appears by Carole Gibb/office manager.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.
Stipulation and Order to use Judge Pro Tem signed by the parties on Jan. 14, 2016 and on file.
Mr. Corcran and Ms. Ibay testify on behalf of FINE LINE SAWING & DRILLING, INC. and respond to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit (A) - 12/8/2015 e-mail
(B) - 01/7/2014 e-mail
(C) - invoices
(D) - 9/19/2014 e-mail
(E) - group exhibits/various exhibits

Ms. Gibb testifies on behalf of ANDREW M JORDAN INC. dba A & B Construction and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit (1) - Package exhibits

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Newly marked evidence is retained by the Court.

Judge Pro Tem Diana Kruze; Clerk J. Kong; Matter Not Reported.

NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR ORDER CORRECTING NAME IN JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jan-28-2016 Granted Per Written Order

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-14-2016 Continued To Feb-17-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
MINI MINUTES: Appearance on Thursday, January 14, 2016, in Department 525:
Fine Line Sawing & Drilling, Inc., Respondent/Plaintiff appears by Dennis Corcoran/president and Mary Kristine T. Ibay/Account Manager.
Andrew M. Jordan dba A &B Construction, Appellant/Defendant appears by Carole Gibb/office manger.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.
Court continued the matter to February 17, 2016 at 9am in D525; pending Order on Petition for Name Correction. Both parties agreed on the continuance date in open Court.

Judge Pro Tem Diana Kruze; Clerk J. Kong; Matter Not Reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Oct-20-2015 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
